agent_guidance.write_scope_summary: Edit the canonical Topogram source and project-owned files only; generated-owned outputs should be regenerated.

slice_manifest.note: Read must_read sections first; use reference sections only as needed; run proof commands before completing work.

standing_rules.description: Code must be organized, maintainable, security-focused, tested, and testable for long-lived intermittent maintenance.
standing_rules.name: Maintainable Security Focused Code

standing_rules.description: Status, history, trust, provenance, generated sentinels, archives, release state, and rollout state should be changed through canonical commands.
standing_rules.name: Stateful Workflow Mutations Use CLI

standing_rules.description: Tests should prove behavior that consumers, maintainers, or agents rely on; compile, run, validate, or inspect real outputs where practical.
standing_rules.name: Tests Prove Consumer Value

summary.description: High-density incident table for queue and team review.
summary.name: Data Grid

diagnostics: No authored accessibility obligation DSL block exists yet; use the linked terms, decision, and draft requirement as implementation guidance.
obligations: Prefer semantic role, accessible-name source, keyboard model, focus behavior, live-region need, and proof command over raw aria-* snapshots.
Treat raw aria-* attributes as generated or maintained implementation evidence, not the contract source.
accessibility.source: topo terms, decisions, draft requirements, and design-token evidence

change_targets.reason: Widget binding is the work leaf where data, action, region, and design obligations meet.

widgetMappings.reviewNotes: Primary maintained React table for wide operations workspaces. Bulk selection is visible; keyboard sorting still needs implementation proof.
Narrow web carries the queue contract as cards, but loading and error states are still review work.
Native iOS realization is intentionally implementation-owned in this web-first proof.
Android queue realization is deliberately unsupported until a native component proof exists.
